templates.name: Are your boxes gluten-free?
templates.content: I'm afraid we do not offer gluten-free boxes, although many of the products we do include happen to be gluten-free! However, if you receive something that you cannot use, we're happy to issue rewards points for you to find a suitable replacement on our site.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Can I purchase a single box?
templates.content: Yes! You can purchase one of our past boxes at the following link: https://www.grillmastersclub.com/collections/past-boxes

templates.name: Where can I find gift notification cards?
templates.content: Please visit our Gift Notification Card page to explore print and digital versions to send to your gift recipient: https://www.grillmastersclub.com/pages/gift-notification-cards Father's Day, anniversaries, birthdays, congrats, thank you versions and more are available!

templates.name: What's included in a grill masters club box?
templates.content: Each monthly box is a carefully curated collection of 5+ premium grilling and BBQ products, including barbecue sauces, dry rubs, marinades, spices, hot sauces, and other grilling surprises we know you'll love. Remember to scan the QR code inside your box to unlock the full experience, including bonus recipes, grilling tips, video content, and exclusive deals and discounts from the suppliers!

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can sign up for our affiliate program here: https://www.grillmastersclub.com/pages/affiliates

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/grillmastersclubvip/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/GrillMastersClub/

templates.name: I'm a content creator, can we work together?
templates.content: Absolutely! We're always on the lookout for opportunities to work with content creators on all types of content - from video collaborations to guest posts on our blog and more. If you have a piece of content you'd like featured on our website and promoted on our social media accounts, please review our UGC Terms here:  https://www.grillmastersclub.com/pages/terms-of-service and email the content to social@grillmastersclub.com.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at sourcing@grillmastersclub.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Military discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! Please email us at support@grillmastersclub.com with your documentation to receive a promo code that will save 10% off your subscription to Grill Masters Club.

templates.name: How does recurring billing and the subscription plan work?
templates.content: The Ultimate BBQ Experience is a monthly subscription and subscriptions are set to autorenew. However, you can pause, cancel or downgrade the box frequency at any time. Autorenewal (recurring billing) occurs on the 1st or 15th of the month (depending on when you placed your first order) in which you receive the final box of your subscription order. Simply put, if you're a month-to-month subscriber, you'll be billed monthly. If you purchase a 3-month auto-renewing subscription, you'll be billed every three months.

templates.name: Can't print Gift Card
templates.content: You can select and print your Gift Card here: https://www.grillmastersclub.com/pages/gift-notification-cards#shopify-section-template--16473999737049__166454512060d9dd62 Let me know if there's anything else I can assist you with!

templates.name: Customer Support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@grillmastersclub.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Free Shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all domestic orders.

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://www.grillmastersclub.com/policies/refund-policy

templates.name: Shipping Time
templates.content:
Your first box ships within 72 hours. Subsequent boxes will ship on or around the 9th or 23rd of the following month, depending on when your first box ships. Subscription orders received from the 1st to 15th of each month get placed in the batch that ships on the 9th; subscription orders received from the 16th - 31st of each month get placed in the batch that ships on the 23rd.

Once your box has been packed and assigned a shipping label, you'll receive tracking information via email so you can monitor the status of your delivery.
